name: Crickets
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Land O Lakes butter, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except almonds and raisins.
2. Beat the mixture for 1 minute at medium speed using a mixer.
3. Stir in the almonds and raisins.
4. Drop teaspoonfuls of the batter, spaced about 2 inches apart, onto ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes.
